properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v5 v6

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Alleluia! Alleluia! For the Lord God Almighty reigns. Alleluia! Alleluia! For the Lord God Almighty reigns.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Alleluia! Holy, Holy are You, Lord God Almighty. Worthy is the lamb. Worthy is the lamb.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are Holy, Holy are You, Lord God Almighty. Worthy is the lamb. Worthy is the lamb.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Amen. Alleluia! Alleluia! For the Lord God Almighty reigns. Alleluia! Alleluia! For the Lord God Almighty reigns.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: You are Holy… Holy are You, Lord God Almighty. Worthy is the lamb. Worthy is the lamb.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Amen. Worthy is the lamb. Worthy is the lamb. Amen.
